citations.desc: Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries.
citations.narrative:
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 11:00 AM on
05/05/2026. The inspector attempted to contact the registrant by calling him on the phone. The registrant answered the
call and explained he was not available for inspection. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for
inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in
enforcement action.
End Section

narrative:
2.126(b)  Repeat
   
Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries. 
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 11:00 AM on 
05/05/2026. The inspector attempted to contact the registrant by calling him on the phone. The registrant answered the 
call and explained he was not available for inspection. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for 
inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in 
enforcement action. 
 
 
End Section
